---
title: "Generalized Linear Models"
subtitle: "McCullagh & Nelder 기반 — 지수족에서 IRLS까지"
description: |
  일반화 선형 모형(GLM) 시리즈. 지수족 분포, 연결함수, 이탈도,
  IRLS 알고리즘, 로지스틱 회귀 등 McCullagh & Nelder 교재를 뼈대로 전개한다.
categories:
  - Statistics
  - Regression
author: Kwangmin Kim
date: 04/13/2026
---

# Generalized Linear Models (GLM)

GLM은 정규 선형 회귀를 지수족 분포 전체로 확장한 통합 프레임워크이다.
핵심 교재: McCullagh & Nelder (1989), Faraway (2006).

---

## 포스트 목록

* 2026-04-13, [GLM 의 기원과 배경 — Gauss부터 Nelder-Wedderburn까지 (McCullagh & Nelder Ch.1)](./00-glm-mccullagh-ch1-background.qmd)
* 2026-04-13, [GLM 이론 기초 — 지수족·정준연결·이탈도·IRLS (McCullagh & Nelder Ch.2)](./01-1-glm-theory-foundation.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [GLM Process of Model Fitting — Model Selection·Estimation·Prediction (McCullagh §2.1)](./01-2-glm-process-of-model-fitting.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [The Components of a GLM — Random·Systematic·Link 의 상세 해부 (McCullagh §2.2)](./01-3-glm-components.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [GLM 적합도 측정 — Deviance·Pearson·Analysis of Deviance (McCullagh §2.3)](./01-4-glm-measuring-goodness-of-fit.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [GLM 잔차의 세 유형 — Pearson·Anscombe·Deviance Residuals (McCullagh §2.4)](./01-5-glm-residuals.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [GLM 적합 알고리즘 — IRLS 의 완전한 유도 (McCullagh §2.5)](./01-6-glm-fitting-algorithm.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [GLM 의 지적 계보 — Bibliographic Notes (McCullagh §2.6)](./01-7-glm-bibliographic-notes.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [GLM 심화 결과와 연습 — Exponential Tilting·CLT·McCullagh Angular (McCullagh §2.7)](./01-8-glm-further-results-exercises.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [정규-항등 GLM 개관 — Continuous Data with Constant Variance (McCullagh Ch.3)](./02-1-normal-models-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [정규 선형모형의 오차 구조 — Error Structure (McCullagh §3.2)](./02-2-normal-error-structure.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [선형 예측자의 구성 — Systematic Component (McCullagh §3.3)](./02-3-systematic-component.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [모형식 대수 — Model Formulae for Linear Predictors (McCullagh §3.4)](./02-4-model-formulae.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [Aliasing — 식별불가의 두 얼굴과 추정가능함수 (McCullagh §3.5)](./02-5-aliasing.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [선형모형의 추정 — MLE·사영 기하·정보·다중공선성 (McCullagh §3.6)](./02-6-estimation.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [표 형태 데이터의 회귀 — Tables as Data (McCullagh §3.7)](./02-7-tables-as-data.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [최소제곱 알고리즘 — Sweep·Cholesky·QR·Gram-Schmidt (McCullagh §3.8)](./02-8-algorithms-least-squares.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [공변량 선택 — Parsimony·Atkinson 통일 공식·자동 절차 (McCullagh §3.9)](./02-9-selection-of-covariates.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [선형모형 심화 결과와 연습 — Ch.3 Exercises 재구성 (McCullagh §3.11)](./02-10-further-results-exercises.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [이항 자료 GLM 개관 — Binary Data (McCullagh Ch.4)](./03-1-binary-data-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [이항분포 — Genesis·Cumulants·극한·변환 (McCullagh §4.2)](./03-2-binomial-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [이항 반응 모형 — 링크 함수·모수 해석·후향 샘플링 (McCullagh §4.3)](./03-3-models-binary-responses.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [이항 자료의 우도함수 — 로그우도·이탈도·편향·희소성·외삽 (McCullagh §4.4)](./03-4-likelihood-functions-binary.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [이항 자료의 과산포 — Over-dispersion (McCullagh §4.5)](./03-5-overdispersion.qmd)
* 2026-04-14, [이항 GLM 심화 결과와 연습 — Ch.4 Exercises 재구성 (McCullagh §4.8)](./03-6-further-results-exercises.qmd)
* 2026-03-07, [GLM 응용 통합 — 고전 검정부터 분포 확장까지 (t-test·ANOVA·로지스틱·포아송)](./02-glm-applied-unification.qmd)
* 2026-04-07, [Logistic Regression: The Model — GLM 3요소, 로짓 링크, 오즈비, MLE, 정보행렬, Wald/LRT](./logistic-regression-model.qmd)
* 2026-04-07, [Logistic Regression: Estimation — 헤시안 순오목성, Newton-Raphson, IRLS, 이탈도](./logistic-regression-estimation.qmd)
* 1111-11-11, Poisson Regression — 카운트 데이터, 로그 연결, 과산포 (McCullagh Ch.6)
* 1111-11-11, Binary Data — 로지스틱·프로빗·보완로그-로그 비교 (McCullagh Ch.4)
* 2026-04-15, [Models for Polytomous Data — 개관 · 측정 척도와 모형 지도 (McCullagh Ch.5)](./04-1-polytomous-data-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Measurement Scales — 명목·순서·구간·계층 척도와 링크 선택 (McCullagh §5.2)](./04-2-measurement-scales.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [The Multinomial Distribution — 생성·모멘트·일반화역행렬·Pearson $X^2$·이항분해 (McCullagh §5.3)](./04-3-multinomial-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Likelihood Functions for Polytomous GLMs — 로그우도·스코어·이탈도·과산포·치즈 실험 (McCullagh §5.4~§5.6)](./04-4-polytomous-likelihood.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Over-dispersion in Polytomous GLMs — 군집 샘플링·Dirichlet-multinomial·$\sigma^2$ 추정 (McCullagh §5.5, §4.5)](./04-5-overdispersion.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Polytomous GLM Examples — 치즈 맛 시뮬레이션과 탄광부 진폐증 (McCullagh §5.6)](./04-6-polytomous-examples.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Polytomous GLM 심화 결과와 연습 — 조합·정보·모형 등가·score vs Wilcoxon·LDA (McCullagh §5.7~§5.8)](./04-7-further-results-exercises.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Log-linear Models — 개관 · 카운트 데이터·포아송 과산포·다항 쌍대성 (McCullagh Ch.6 §6.1)](./05-1-log-linear-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Likelihood Functions for Log-linear Models — 포아송 로그우도·$\mu^{1/3}$ 이차 근사·과산포 3 메커니즘·NB (McCullagh §6.2)](./05-2-poisson-likelihood.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Log-linear Models — 예제 · Fisher 결핵균 라틴 정방과 Lloyd's 선박 손상 rate 회귀 (McCullagh §6.3)](./05-3-log-linear-examples.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Log-linear 과 Multinomial Response 의 쌍대성 — 포아송 조건부·장해 모수 소거·식 (6.8) (McCullagh §6.4)](./05-4-poisson-multinomial-duality.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Multiple Responses in Log-linear Models — 조건부 독립·분해가능성·정준상관·다변량 회귀 (McCullagh §6.5)](./05-5-multiple-responses.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Log-linear Models — Respiratory Ailments 예제 · 이변량 로짓 vs 로그선형 해석 차이 (McCullagh §6.6)](./05-6-three-way-tables.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Log-linear 심화 결과와 연습 — 포아송 변환·음이항·이변량 로짓·APA 투표·말발굽 (McCullagh §6.7~§6.8)](./05-7-log-linear-exercises.qmd)
* 2026-04-15, [Conditional Likelihoods — Ch.7 전체 개관 · 장해 모수·축약 우도·초기하·매칭 쌍·Bradley–Terry (McCullagh Ch.7)](./06-1-conditional-likelihood-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [초기하분포족 — 중심, 비중심, 다변량 확장과 조건부 추론 (McCullagh §7.3)](./06-2-hypergeometric-distributions.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [이항 자료 응용 — 두 이항 비교·Mantel-Haenszel·Ille-et-Vilaine 식도암 (McCullagh §7.4)](./06-3-binary-data-applications.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [다범주 자료 응용 — 매칭 쌍 명목·순서형·Quasi-Symmetry·Bradley-Terry·치즈 실험 (McCullagh §7.5)](./06-4-polytomous-data-applications.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [조건부 우도 심화 결과와 연습 — 축약 우도·REML·Fieller-Creasy·사영 행렬·초기하 반복 (McCullagh §7.7)](./06-5-conditional-likelihood-exercises.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [Models for Data with Constant Coefficient of Variation — 감마 분포·역수 연결·로그 연결·산포 추정 (McCullagh Ch.8)](./07-1-constant-cv-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [The Gamma Distribution — 밀도·누율·형태 모수·합성·정규화 변환 (McCullagh §8.2)](./07-2-gamma-distribution.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [Models with Gamma-Distributed Observations — 분산 함수·이탈도·정준/로그/항등 연결·산포 추정 (McCullagh §8.3)](./07-3-gamma-models.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [Gamma GLM Examples — 자동차 보험·혈액 응고·강수량·초파리 발생률 (McCullagh §8.4)](./07-4-gamma-examples.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [Gamma GLM 심화 결과와 연습 — CV-log 근사·Dirichlet 독립성·편향 보정·로그 변환 효율·정확 검정 (McCullagh §8.5-§8.6)](./07-5-gamma-exercises.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [Quasi-likelihood Functions 개관 — 분포 없이 평균-분산만으로 추론하는 GLM 확장 (McCullagh Ch.9)](./08-1-quasi-likelihood-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [Independent Observations — 공분산 제약·준-스코어 3 성질·Table 9.1 전 유도·Leaf-blotch 완전 분석 (McCullagh §9.2)](./08-2-quasi-likelihood-independent.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [Dependent Observations — 비대각 공분산·경로 독립성·voter transition·GEE 연결 (McCullagh §9.3)](./08-3-quasi-likelihood-dependent.qmd)
* 2026-04-18, [Optimal Estimating Functions — 추정함수 이론·기본 추정함수 결합·Fieller-Creasy·Avebury 거석환 (McCullagh §9.4)](./08-4-optimal-estimating-functions.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Optimality Criteria — 선형 추정함수 클래스·Gauss-Markov 유비·정밀도 차이·등호 조건·조건부 확장 (McCullagh §9.5)](./08-5-optimality-criteria.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Extended Quasi-likelihood — Q⁺ 정의·h₁ 유도·Saddlepoint 근사·스코어 모멘트·산포 회귀 (McCullagh §9.6)](./08-6-extended-quasi-likelihood.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Quasi-likelihood 심화 결과와 연습 — Poisson-Gamma 혼합·Voter Transition·Löwner·타원 적합·Mantel-Haenszel (McCullagh §9.8)](./08-7-further-results-exercises.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Joint Modelling of Mean and Dispersion — 이중 GLM·Q⁺·첨도·REML 보정·Godambe-Thompson·Leaf-spring (McCullagh Ch.10)](./09-1-joint-mean-dispersion-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Model Specification for Joint Mean-Dispersion — 이중 GLM 설계 도면·$r_P^2$ vs $r_D^2$·$V_D(\phi)$·연결함수·교대 IRLS (McCullagh §10.2)](./09-2-model-specification.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Interaction between Mean and Dispersion Effects — null 대조·replicate 대조·마진 조건·$V(\mu)$ 오선택·평균 누락의 산포 오염 (McCullagh §10.3)](./09-3-mean-dispersion-interaction.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Extended Quasi-Likelihood as a Criterion — $Q^+$ 이중 GLM 목적함수·(10.3)(10.4)(10.5) 유도·$V_D(\phi)=\phi^2$ 고정·블록 대각 정보 (McCullagh §10.4)](./09-4-extended-quasi-likelihood-criterion.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Adjustments of the Estimating Equations — 첨도 $(1+\rho_4/2)^{-1}$·자유도 $\nu/n$·$Q_M^+$·$2^3=8$ 변종·REML 유비 (McCullagh §10.5)](./09-5-dispersion-equation-adjustments.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Joint Optimum Estimating Equations — Godambe-Thompson·$(g_{1i}, g_{2i})$·공분산 $V_i$·유도 $D_i$·식 (10.7) (McCullagh §10.6)](./09-6-joint-optimum-estimating-equations.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Leaf-spring Example — Pignatiello-Ramberg $2^{5-1}$ factorial·replicate vs null 대조·부호 역전·Table 10.3-10.5 (McCullagh §10.7)](./09-7-leaf-spring-example.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Ch.10 Exercises — 지수 이탈도 $7/6$·공통 모수·Table 10.1 유도·블록 대각 정보 (McCullagh §10.9)](./09-9-joint-mean-dispersion-exercises.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Models with Additional Non-Linear Parameters — 개관 · 분산함수·링크·공변량 속 미지 모수·Pregibon·Box-Tidwell (McCullagh Ch.11)](./10-1-non-linear-parameters-overview.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Parameters in the Variance Function — 음이항 $k$·Poisson-Gamma 혼합·digamma·profile likelihood·반올림 분산 $\tau^2+\sigma^2\mu^2$ (McCullagh §11.2)](./10-2-parameters-in-variance-function.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Parameters in the Link Function — Box-Cox 멱 링크·Pregibon 선형화·goodness-of-link·logit-cloglog 가족·데이터 vs 적합값 변환 (McCullagh §11.3)](./10-3-parameters-in-link-function.qmd)
* 2026-04-19, [Non-Linear Parameters in the Covariates — Box-Tidwell 선형화·반복 2중 루프·분산 보정·지수합 식별성·$\log(x_1+\theta x_2)$ 약물 혼합 (McCullagh §11.4)](./10-4-non-linear-parameters-in-covariates.qmd)
